beats.title: Toward the Portal
beats.boundaryReason: These opening units form one continuous setup sequence: the recap from the prior session, the party's preparations in Cleenseau, the concealed approach through the portal, and the first mapping pass through the thorn maze before any active fight begins.

beats.title: Vines on the Long Route
beats.boundaryReason: Once the party reaches the roofed portion of the maze, the scene narrows into a distinct hazard-and-skirmish sequence against the grabby vines, ending only after the group adapts its tactics and pushes onward to the center.

beats.title: The Gazebo Falls
beats.boundaryReason: From the first sight of the thorn knot onward, the source stays focused on one continuous objective scene: surviving the collapsing chamber, studying the ritual knot, destroying it under pressure from a thorn guardian, and escaping the dead maze afterward.

beats.title: Flight to the Pine Forest
beats.boundaryReason: After the portal collapses, the next scene is a travel-and-recovery stretch: the accelerated retreat across the Gloomshaper's territory, the decision to camp, and the discovery of the suspiciously welcoming cottage in the pine forest.

beats.title: Tea Under House Rules
beats.boundaryReason: This middle social beat stays centered on the cottage's etiquette test: the goat-headed servant's unsettling reveal, the old lady's rigid hospitality rules, the party's efforts to recover her goodwill, and the first hints about Izar the Red.

beats.title: Wings in the Trophy Room
beats.boundaryReason: The tone shifts from formal hospitality to actionable intelligence: the party questions the goatboy directly, learns that Greymalkin's wings may be in Izar's keep, returns for dinner, and secures the old lady's tacit approval for action against Izar.

beats.title: Morning Trade and Pursuit
beats.boundaryReason: A clear overnight transition starts this final beat: in the morning the party trades for the goatboy, sets out toward Izar's place, pauses halfway there to see what aid they can offer him, and ends on that unresolved next-step setup.
